globalMetadata._description: Managed .NET client library for Sigstore bundle signing and verification — pure managed code, no native binaries. Targets .NET 8, 9, and 10. Cross-client interoperable with cosign and sigstore-python.
globalMetadata._jsonLd: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"SoftwareSourceCode","name":"sigstore-dotnet","description":"Managed .NET client library for Sigstore bundle signing and verification.","codeRepository":"https://github.com/ozimakov/sigstore-dotnet","programmingLanguage":"C#","runtimePlatform":".NET 8, 9, 10","license":"https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0","author":{"@type":"Person","name":"Oleg Zimakov","url":"https://github.com/ozimakov"},"url":"https://sigstore.zimakov.net/","keywords":["sigstore","signing","verification","supply-chain",".net","dotnet","csharp","fulcio","rekor","cosign","transparency-log","keyless-signing"],"downloadUrl":"https://www.nuget.org/packages/Sigstore.Net"}
